---
title: "Open Media and Communication Research"
subtitle: "A curated list of journals for open science in media and communication research"
format:
  html:
    theme: minty
    toc: false
    css: styles.css
---

Created by Moritz Büchi [[github](https://github.com/buih-git) | [profile](https://www.zhaw.ch/en/about-us/person/buih)], Michael Reiss, and Tobias Dienlin.  
Last update: 04/2026.

**Inclusion criteria:** Open science features (hybrid open access alone does not qualify), peer-reviewed, publishes English language articles, focused on Media and Communication generally, on subdisciplines (e.g., science communication, media psychology, etc.), or generalist / other disciplinary journals open to Media and Communication (e.g., PLOS ONE)

Feedback and corrections welcome via [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/buih-git/opencomm-journals/issues).

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

library(tidyverse)
library(DT)

url <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WDTBIop2Eg9CKsvQ1BUgMXJdmrh1TAreyS02SiWEJDY/export?format=csv&gid=0"

df <- read_csv(url, skip = 3, col_names = TRUE) |>
  select(2:21) |>
  filter(!is.na(Journal)) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.logical), ~ if_else(.x, "Yes", "No")))

datatable(df,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
  rownames = FALSE
)
```
